title: Geisha Girl
director: George P. Breakston, C. Ray Stahl
actors: Steve Forrest, Martha Hyer, Archer MacDonald
plot: "Rocky" Wilson and his sidekick, Archer McGregor, American soldiers en route home from Korea, stop over in Tokyo. They instantly get involved in a sabotage plot and, inadvertently, end up in the possession of some highly-explosive...
